headline: These are the best deals you can still get on MacBooks before Apple’s price hike kicks in
summary: Apple just raised MacBook and iPad prices. Existing Prime Day discounts are now even more valuable. Grab a MacBook Neo, Air, or Pro before prices climb further.

headline: Our 36 favorite gaming deals on Prime Day for Switch, PS5, and Xbox
summary: Discover significant Prime Day discounts on top Switch, PS5, and Xbox games. Find deals on both physical and digital copies. Stock up on new and recent hits before sales end.

headline: The beautiful shame
summary: US immigration policies have prevented many from attending the World Cup. Trump's racist policies are cited as the cause. People from Africa, Asia, and the Middle East faced exclusion.

headline: This video bird feeder is the surprise hit of Prime Day
summary: The BirdBuddy Pro with Solar Panels is a popular Prime Day deal. This video bird feeder offers a wholesome yard upgrade. It's usually $299, making the Prime Day discount significant.

headline: The Highly-Rated Bambu Lab P1S Combo Multi-Color 3D Printer Drops to $499.99 for Prime Day
summary: The Bambu Lab P1S Combo Multi-Color 3D Printer is on sale. It's now available for $499.99 during Prime Day. This highly-rated printer suits both novices and professionals.

headline: Amazon Just Dropped Even More 4K and Blu-ray Deals for Prime Day
summary: Amazon released additional 4K and Blu-ray deals for Prime Day. It's a chance to expand your movie collection. Don't miss out on these limited-time film discounts.

headline: Arc System Works Evo Collection Humble Bundle Includes Guilty Gear -Strive- and More, Helps the Raiden Science Foundation
summary: A new Humble Bundle features Arc System Works games like Guilty Gear -Strive-. The bundle supports the Raiden Science Foundation's rare disease research. Get great games and contribute to a good cause.

headline: The Apple AirPods Pro 3 Noise Canceling Earbuds Are on Sale During Amazon Prime Day
summary: Apple AirPods Pro 3 earbuds are on sale for Prime Day. Get them for $70 less than Apple Store pricing. Experience noise-canceling audio at a discounted rate.

headline: Hottest June day record broken for third day in row as temperature hits 37.3C
summary: A new hottest June day record was set, reaching 37.3C. Suffolk recorded the highest temperature on Friday. The heatwave is expected to ease over the weekend.

headline: Court rules 13 men who allegedly helped rapist drug and abuse wife can be named
summary: A court has allowed 13 men accused of assisting a rapist to be named. These men allegedly helped abuse a wife over several years. The ruling brings these individuals into public light.

headline: Mother dies saving daughter in Venezuela earthquakes
summary: A mother tragically died saving her daughter during Venezuela earthquakes. Héctor Bello shared that she sacrificed her life for their child. The quakes have claimed at least 920 lives.

headline: Man who punched female police officers at Manchester Airport jailed
summary: Mohammed Fahir Amaaz was jailed for assaulting police officers. He punched PC Lydia Ward and PC Ellie Cook at Manchester Airport. A Starbucks customer was also attacked during the incident.
